footnote: aMutations in italics occurred at sites optimized during the computational design of HG25. bIndividual parameters $K _ { M }$ and $k _ { \mathrm { c a t } }$ could not be determined accurately because saturation was not possible at the maximum substrate concentration tested $( 2 m M )$ , which is the substrate’s solubility limit (Supplementary Fig. 2). Catalytic efficiencies $( k _ { \mathrm { c a t } } / K _ { N } )$ were calculated from the slope of the linear portion $( [ \mathsf { S } ] \ll K _ { M } )$ of the Michaelis-Menten model $( v _ { 0 } = ( k _ { \tt c a t } / K _ { \tt M } ) [ \mathsf { E } _ { 0 } ] [ \mathsf { S } ] )$ . $n = 2$ independent experiments for HG3, HG3.3b, HG3.7, and HG3.17. $n = 3$ independent experiments for HG3.14 and HG4. Errors of linear regression fitting, which represent the absolute measure of the typical distance that each data point falls from the regression line, are provided. Values in parentheses are from Blomberg et al.15.
